Bi-Weekly Report
• In Brazil, when it rains it pours - As we have been stressing for the past few months, weather remains the key driver
for Capesize rates this time of the year, and clearly that has been the case over the last two weeks when heavy rains
in Brazil's key iron ore producing regions have caused significant disruptions in production, transportation and
loading operations. Although the latest news out of Brazil has been encouraging with Vale confirming a restart of

BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
January 18, 2022
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,913 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,731 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -2.3% ↓ 30D: -27.2% Momentum: Neutral
↓ YTD: -8.1% ↓ YTD: -21.9% Sentiment: Negative
↑ YOY: 40.4% ↓ YOY: -1.3% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• In Brazil, when it rains it pours - As we have been stressing for the past few months, weather remains the key driver
for Capesize rates this time of the year, and clearly that has been the case over the last two weeks when heavy rains
in Brazil's key iron ore producing regions have caused significant disruptions in production, transportation and
loading operations. Although the latest news out of Brazil has been encouraging with Vale confirming a restart of
its operations and minimal impact on its overall production, we are not out of the woods yet.
